name: @shashotolaha/ng-starter
description: Angular starter with Tailwind, PrimeNG, ESLint, and Prettier preconfigured. Supports Angular 19 and 20.

scripts.postbuild:win:
xcopy src
g-new iles dist
g-new iles /E /I /Y & xcopy src
g-add iles dist
g-add iles /E /I /Y
scripts.postbuild: cpx "src/ng-add/files/**/*" dist/ng-add/files --preserve && cpx "src/ng-new/files/**/*" dist/ng-new/files --preserve && cpx "src/**/*.json" dist --preserve
scripts.publish:v20: npm version 20.0.0 --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish --tag latest
scripts.publish:v19: npm version 19.0.0 --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish --tag ngstarterv19

author: Shashoto Laha
